plain.en: O God, who brought many people to the Christian faith through the example and teaching of your Bishop Saint Zeno; grant that, through his intercession, we too may welcome Christ in our hearts and be witnesses of his resurrection in word and deed. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: O God, who brought many people to the Christian faith
through the example and teaching of your Bishop Saint Zeno;
we too may welcome Christ in our hearts
and be witnesses of his resurrection in word and deed.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
